zh.lifeSummary: 當Trahaiarn ap Caradog於大約1044年出生在威爾士福林爾時，他的父親Caradawg ap Gwyn28歲，母親Eleanor verch Gwerystan25歲。他和Nest ferch Gruffudd至少有1個兒子。他去世於1080年在威爾士凱爾納方史爾卡納福享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Trahaiarn ap Caradog于大约1044年出生在威尔士福林爾时，他的父亲Caradawg ap Gwyn28岁，母亲Eleanor verch Gwerystan25岁。他和Nest ferch Gruffudd至少有1个儿子。他去世于1080年在威尔士凱爾納方史爾卡納福享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Trahaiarn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: composed of the intensive prefix tra- + haearn ‘iron’.

variants.name: Traherne
meanings: Traditional: composed of the intensive prefix tra- + haearn ‘iron’.

en.lifeSummary: When Trahaiarn ap Caradog was born about 1044, in Flintshire, Wales, his father, Caradawg ap Gwyn, was 28 and his mother, Eleanor verch Gwerystan, was 25. He had at least 1 son with Nest ferch Gruffudd. He died in 1080, in Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 37.

fr.ARWYSTLI, MONTGOMERYSHIRE, WALES: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Trahaiarn ap Caradog est né environ 1044, à Flintshire, Galles, son père, Caradawg ap Gwyn, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eleanor verch Gwerystan, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Nest ferch Gruffudd. Il est décédé en 1080, à Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Trahaiarn ap Caradog um 1044 in Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Caradawg ap Gwyn 28 und seine Mutter Eleanor verch Gwerystan 25. Er hatte mit Nest ferch Gruffudd mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1080 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Trahaiarn ap Caradog è nato il circa 1044 nel Flintshire, Galles, il suo padre, Caradawg ap Gwyn, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor verch Gwerystan, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Nest ferch Gruffudd. Morì nel 1080, nel Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Trahaiarn ap Caradogが約1044年にウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Caradawg ap Gwynは28歳，母Eleanor verch Gwerystanは25歳であった。彼はNest ferch Gruffuddとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1080年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアカーナルボンで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Trahaiarn ap Caradog(이)가 대략 1044년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Caradawg ap Gwyn(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor verch Gwerystan(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Nest ferch Gruffudd(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1080년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 카른아르폰에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Trahaiarn ap Caradog nasceu aproximadamente 1044, em Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Caradawg ap Gwyn, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor verch Gwerystan, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Nest ferch Gruffudd. Ele faleceu em 1080, em Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 37 anos.

ro.ARWYSTLI, MONTGOMERYSHIRE, WALES: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Trahaiarn ap Caradog родился около 1044 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Caradawg ap Gwyn было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor verch Gwerystan, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Nest ferch Gruffudd. Он умер в 1080 г. в местности карнарвон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Trahaiarn ap Caradog nació aproximadamente 1044, en Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Caradawg ap Gwyn, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Eleanor verch Gwerystan, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Nest ferch Gruffudd. Murió en 1080, en Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 37 años.
